scene: Teen blob Byte actively coding at the desk during warm afternoon light, just after making a commit, with ecstatic energy and low hunger awareness

subjects.description: Byte the teen blob with gangly proportions, bright wide eyes showing excitement, small smile indicating ecstatic mood, teal-blue body with clean pixel edges
subjects.position: centered on the desk, facing the oversized laptop
subjects.action: typing enthusiastically on the laptop keyboard, leaning forward with energetic posture, one hand near keyboard while the other gestures toward the screen

subjects.description: food bowl on the floor to the right, partially empty with only scattered kibble remaining

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette, teen proportions with gangly limbs

mood: ecstatic and energetic from the 5-day streak, focused on coding but with subtle awareness of hunger
